label: Heads-up, button raises, BB folds immediately
transcript: Heads up, one two blinds. I'm on the button with ace king offsuit.
I post the small blind. He posts the big blind. I raise to six. He folds.

label: 6-max limped pot with check-around on flop
transcript: Six-handed, one two blinds. I'm in the cutoff with jack ten of spades.
UTG limps. MP folds. I limp. Button limps. Small blind completes. Big blind checks.
Flop is nine eight deuce, two spades. Everyone checks around.

label: 9-handed with UTG straddle, action starts UTG+1
transcript: Nine-handed, one two blinds. UTG straddles to four.
I'm UTG plus one with pocket tens.
I raise to twelve. Folds around to the straddle. He calls.
Flop is seven five deuce rainbow. He checks. I bet fifteen. He folds.

label: Narrator corrects earlier action mid-hand
transcript: Eight-handed, two five blinds. I'm in the cutoff with ace queen suited, diamonds.
Hijack raises to fifteen.
Wait actually, UTG limped in before that. So UTG limps, then hijack raises to fifteen.
I call. Everyone else folds.
Flop is king ten four, two diamonds. UTG checks. Hijack bets twenty. I call. UTG folds.

label: Transcript contains ASR errors that must be interpreted
transcript: Six-handed, one two blinds. I'm in the big blind with king jack off suit.
Folds to the bottom who raises to five. Small blind folds. I core.
Flop is queen nine three. An eye check. He bets eight. I core.
Turn is a six. An eye check. He checks back.

label: One transcript segment spans preflop action into flop
transcript: Six max, one two blinds. I'm on the button with ace ten of hearts.
Folds to me, I raise to five. Small blind folds. Big blind calls. Flop comes ace king deuce, one heart. He checks. I bet six. He calls.
Turn is the four of hearts. He checks. I bet eighteen. He folds.

label: Post-flop check-raise sequence
transcript: Six max, one two blinds. I'm the big blind with nine eight of clubs.
Cutoff raises to five. Button calls. Small blind folds. I call.
Flop is ten seven six with two clubs. I check. Cutoff bets eight. Button folds. I raise to twenty-four. Cutoff calls.
Turn is the deuce of clubs. I bet thirty-five. He folds.

label: Short stack goes all-in for less than the bet
transcript: Six max, one two blinds. I'm on the button with ace jack offsuit. The big blind only has thirty chips behind.
Folds to me. I raise to five. Small blind folds. Big blind calls.
Flop is ace eight three. He checks. I bet twenty. He goes all in for twenty-five total. I call.

label: Pure commentary segments with no game actions
transcript: Six-handed, one two blinds. I'm under the gun with ace king suited, spades.
I raise to six. Everyone folds.
That's a sick spot honestly.
I can't believe they all folded. Free money I guess.
Alright next hand.

label: Dangling subject split across two transcript segments
transcript: Six max, two five blinds. I'm on the button with king queen offsuit.
Folds to the cutoff who raises to twelve. I call. Blinds fold.
Flop is jack ten four rainbow.
He bets fifteen. I call.
Turn is a three. He bets
thirty-five. I fold.

label: Hero has pocket queens, tests pair card parsing
transcript: Six max, one two blinds. I'm under the gun with pocket queens.
I raise to six. Folds to the big blind who calls.
Flop is jack eight three, all spades. He checks. I bet eight. He folds.

label: Hero has seven-eight of diamonds, tests suited card parsing
transcript: Six max, one two blinds. I'm in the hijack. I look down at seven eight of diamonds.
I raise to five. Everyone folds except the big blind who calls.
Flop is nine six two with one diamond. He checks. I bet six. He calls.
Turn is the five of diamonds. He checks. I bet eighteen. He folds.

label: Flop described as rainbow, suits must be inferred as all different
transcript: Six max, one two blinds. I'm MP with ace king offsuit.
UTG folds. I raise to five. Folds to big blind who calls.
Flop comes ace seven deuce rainbow. He checks. I bet four. He calls.
Turn is a king. He checks. I bet twelve. He folds.

label: Open raise, 3-bet, 4-bet, call preflop
transcript: Six max, one two blinds. I'm on the button with pocket aces, ace of spades ace of hearts.
Cutoff raises to five. I three-bet to fifteen. Small blind folds. Big blind folds. Cutoff four-bets to forty. I call.
Flop is jack nine three, two hearts. He bets forty-five. I call.
Turn is the deuce of spades. He checks. I go all in for one hundred fifteen. He folds.

label: Hand goes to showdown, villain shows cards
transcript: Six max, one two blinds. I'm in the cutoff with king queen of hearts.
Folds to me. I raise to five. Button folds. Small blind folds. Big blind calls.
Flop is queen jack four, one heart. He checks. I bet six. He calls.
Turn is the ten of hearts. He checks. I bet fifteen. He calls.
River is the two of clubs. He checks. I bet thirty. He calls.
He shows ace queen offsuit and I win with two pair. Wait no, he just has top pair. I win.

label: Everyone folds to BB, BB wins uncontested (walk)
transcript: Nine-handed, one two blinds. I'm in the big blind with seven deuce offsuit.
Everyone folds to me. I win the pot.

label: 9-handed with action from multiple positions across streets and implicit folds
transcript: Nine-handed, one two blinds. I'm in the hijack with ace jack of spades.
UTG folds. UTG plus one calls. UTG plus two folds. Lojack folds. I raise to ten.
Cutoff folds. Button calls. Blinds fold. UTG plus one calls.
Flop is king ten four with two spades. UTG plus one checks. I bet fifteen. Button folds. UTG plus one calls.
Turn is the queen of spades. He checks. I bet thirty. He calls.
River is the eight of clubs. He checks. I bet fifty. He folds.
